tagline: Refresh Your Pool, Refresh Your Life

hero.headline: Pool Care Built on Honesty & Trust
hero.subheadline: No missed appointments. No guessing games. Just consistent, transparent pool service from a locally owned Dallas team that treats your backyard like it matters.

Clear communication — no surprises on your bill
Locally owned and operated in East Dallas

services.headline: Pool Services You Can Actually Count On
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to full renovations — done right, communicated clearly, every single time.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Consistent cleaning, chemical balancing, filter care, and equipment checks — with detailed reports and photos sent after every visit.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Installation
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, valves, chlorinators, and pool sweeps to keep your system running efficiently.

cards.title: Pool Renovations
cards.description: Complete overhauls including tile replacement, replastering, deck and paver work, and mastic replacement to transform your backyard.

cards.title: Leak Detection & Repair
cards.description: Professional pressure testing, equipment testing, and diver services to locate and repair leaks quickly — before they become costly problems.

cards.title: Chemical Balancing
cards.description: Precise water chemistry management to keep your pool safe, crystal clear, and comfortable for your family all season long.

cards.title: Seasonal Pool Care
cards.description: Opening and closing services plus seasonal equipment prep so your pool is always ready when you are — no stress, no guesswork.

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Assessment
steps.description: Call or fill out our form and we'll visit your pool within 48 hours to evaluate its current condition.

steps.title: Get a Straightforward Plan
steps.description: We'll explain exactly what your pool needs, what it costs, and what to expect — no hidden fees, no upsells.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard Again
steps.description: Sit back while our certified techs handle everything. You'll get photo reports after each visit so you always know what's happening.

about.label: About Refresh Pool
about.headline: Founded to Fix What's Broken in Pool Service
about.description: Drew Stephenson started Refresh Pool Company after seeing too many Dallas homeowners frustrated by missed appointments, poor communication, and surprise charges. With over a decade in the pool industry, Drew built Refresh on three pillars: Honesty, Communication, and Quality. Every technician is CMS and RAIL certified, and every visit comes with a detailed report so you always know the state of your pool.
about.badge: Locally Owned in East Dallas Since 2018

features.title: Photo Reports After Every Visit
features.description: You'll receive detailed photos and notes after each service so you always know exactly what was done and what condition your pool is in.

features.title: CMS & RAIL Certified Technicians
features.description: Every technician on our team is professionally certified, ensuring your pool receives expert-level care every single visit.

features.title: Integrity in Everything We Do
features.description: As a Christ-centered organization, we operate with honesty and fairness. No upsells, no shortcuts — just quality work you can trust.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: We quote what we charge and charge what we quote. Every service plan is customized to your pool's specific needs.

guarantee.headline: Our Transparency Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you ever feel uninformed about what's happening with your pool, we'll make it right. We believe clear communication isn't optional — it's the foundation of trust. You'll always know what we did, what we found, and what comes next.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in the DFW metroplex?
faqs.answer: We serve Dallas and surrounding DFW areas, with a focus on East Dallas neighborhoods. Contact us to confirm we service your specific location.

faqs.question: What happens during a weekly maintenance visit?
faqs.answer: Each visit includes skimming, brushing, vacuuming, chemical testing and adjustment, filter cleaning, and a full equipment inspection. You'll receive a detailed report with photos after every visit.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Yes — all of our technicians are CMS Certified and RAIL Licensed, ensuring they have the training and expertise to properly care for your pool and equipment.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to equipment issues or leaks?
faqs.answer: For existing maintenance customers, we prioritize equipment repairs and can usually diagnose the issue within 24-48 hours. Leak detection is scheduled based on availability.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service visits?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most customers provide gate access and we handle everything while you're away. You'll get a photo report so you can see exactly what was done.

testimonials.name: HomeAdvisor Customer
testimonials.text: Refresh Pool Company was amazing to work with. Timely service, very reasonable prices, and highly communicative staff. Could not recommend them enough.

testimonials.name: Angi Customer
testimonials.text: Drew is reliable, honest, professional and personable, and extremely knowledgeable about pool service, cleaning, and repair. He truly cares about his customers.

testimonials.name: HomePros Verified Customer
testimonials.text: Refresh Pool was the first pool services company to answer the phone and make time to come out. Great customer service and very knowledgeable staff. Couldn't be happier.
